name: ysbzs-boardgameio-adapter
description: Adapter layer that maps ysbzs dispatchGameAction/state model onto boardgame.io-style moves while keeping uploaded upstream boardgame.io-main source unmodified.

scripts.check:ysbzs: cd ../apps/ysbzs && npm test && npm run check:csv && npm run check:day7 && npm run check:dom && npm run check:all
scripts.check:all: npm run check:upstream && npm run check:adapter && npm run check:ysbzs
